---
title: "Peter Andreas Munch"
---

## Peter Andreas Munch

**Dates:** (1810-1863)

### Description

mediaeval historian

### Biography

He was author of <i>Det norske Folks Historie</i>, 6 vols (Christiania: Tønsberg 1852-9), and uncle of the painter Edvard Munch. He gave advice on CMY’s <i>Christian Names</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 11th 1871
- Letter from March 14th 1870
- Letter from Novr 4th 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
